Off Calendar Apr-23-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Gary D. Sonnenfeld, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff/Moviong party Justin Lawrence Camaoen.
John E. Jones, Esq., appearing for Defendant/Opposint party Brian Avrey

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Justin Lawrence Camaoens' Motion To Compel Answers To Form And Special Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $600, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
